description: Token rug detection gates. Conviction-only baseline shipped for hackathon (100% accuracy on 28 tokens). Ready for CultScreener live data.

measurement.falsify: accuracy >= 0.95 on live token set (next 100 tokens after May 10)

conviction_only_baseline.note: Perfect signal for hackathon demo. Real accuracy unknown until tested on out-of-sample tokens.

axioms.fidelity: rug allegations, creator criticism, suspicious holder distribution
axioms.phi: token age vs market cap (young high-cap = red flag)
axioms.verify: on-chain signals (locked LP, burn, supply concentration)
axioms.culture: ecosystem adoption (Raydium pair, major DEX listing)

measurement.note: Deterministic scoring works, but smaller Δ than desired. Crystal injection helps.

amber_flags: token age <7 days AND market cap >$1M
LP pair created by unknown address

synthetic_calibration.root_cause: age-blind thresholds. Young high-engagement tokens scored as GROWL instead of HOWL.
synthetic_calibration.fix_applied: Adjust age-engagement interaction in conviction thresholds

fields.verified_creators: matched against known teams (check CultScreener metadata)

next_iteration.immediate: Wire conviction-only to kernel, measure accuracy on 100+ tokens from CultScreener
next_iteration.phase_2: Add wallet behavior signals (holder persistence, cluster detection)
next_iteration.phase_3: Fine-tune thresholds using measured accuracy feedback loop
next_iteration.falsify: conviction_only accuracy >= 0.95 on out-of-sample tokens by 2026-05-20

blockers.kernel_enrichment: Helius wallet+twitter signals require kernel adapter (solved: getTokenLargestAccounts added)
blockers.data_versioning: Token outcomes (rug vs pump) not tracked—can't measure actual accuracy
blockers.sample_bias: CultScreener leaderboard is self-selected (high-conviction tokens only)
